name: cf-socks
description: Cloudflare Worker backed TCP dialer with SOCKS5 and Go SDK clients

scripts.worker:bundle-dashboard: esbuild worker/src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:cloudflare:sockets --banner:js="// Generated from worker/src/index.ts. Do not edit by hand." --outfile=worker/single-file.js
